message:
fix: case-insensitive navigation and polish terminal help descriptions

Terminal goto command:
- Normalize both user input and valid slugs to lowercase before
  comparison, so "goto Showcase" and "goto SHOWCASE" work the same
  as "goto showcase". Previously, non-lowercase input silently failed
  with "Unknown destination".
- Improve navigation feedback: show the slug name in the output
  message instead of the raw route path (e.g., "Navigating to
  SHOWCASE..." instead of "Navigating to /showcase...").
- Bump close delay from 500ms to 600ms to give the user slightly
  more time to read the navigation confirmation.

Help text:
- Tighten descriptions: "Toggle X-Ray Anatomy Mode" (capitalize),
  "Toggle Galvanic Audio System" (full system name), "Clear command
  history" and "Close terminal interface" for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
